title: 宝塚記念の後に・声援の成分

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd roars with cheer for Agnes Tachyon's
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes back thrilled, realizing the source of
her stronger than usual performance came from
their cheers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the autumn Tenno Sho and the Arima Kinen
still ahead, she comes closer to stepping beyond
the limits.
